command: echo '=== Current .ex5 check ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/' -name '*.ex5' -ls 2>&1 && echo '=== PropFirmBot dir ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/' 2>&1 && echo '=== Today EA log ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260226.log' 2>&1 | tr -d '\0' | tail -30 && echo '=== Check deploy report ===' && cat /root/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/deploy_report.txt 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Check run #12 ===' && TOKEN=$(cat /root/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null | grep -o '//[^:]*:[^@]*@' | sed 's|//||;s|@||;s|.*:||' | head -1) && curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=3&branch=claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU' > /tmp/runs.json && python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open("/tmp/runs.json")); [print(f"#{r["run_number"]} {r["status"]}/{r.get("conclusion","?")} {r["created_at"]}") for r in d.get("workflow_runs",[])]' 2>&1
